_comment: Parity fixtures for editTag. Each fixture has existing tag rows, an edit request, the returned value, and the expected remaining rows after edit.

input.tags: Existing rows from the `tags` table. Fields: id, name, intended_use, is_hidden, sort_order.
input.request: Object passed to editTag. Fields: id and name.

schema.expected: Object returned by editTag, per js/data/contracts/editTag.md.
schema.expectedState: Rows that should remain after edit.

fixtures.name: 01-rename-existing-tag
fixtures.description: Rename one existing tag and keep a different tag unchanged.

fixtures.name: 02-clean-name-before-saving
fixtures.description: Spaces are trimmed and long names are clipped before saving.

fixtures.name: 03-rename-missing-tag
fixtures.description: Renaming a valid id that is already gone succeeds and leaves existing rows alone.
